narrative:
31 Ohio Senate district has 208,251 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.2% D−R vs -16.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
